sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Kumpipa tungah Ukna Pia

verses.text: Topa in ka to kumpipa tungah, “Na galte nangma khengakna-in ka bawl matengin ka taklamah tu in,” a ci hi
Topa in Zion panin na kumpi ciangkhut hong puak hi. Na galte' tungah uk in
Nangma mihonte mual siangtho tungah na makaih ciangin, utna lungsim tawh na mite hong kipia ding uh hi. Daitui bangin zingsangin na khangnona nangma tungah hong tung ding hi
Topa in thu ciamzo a, ama ngaihsutna kheello ding hi. “Melkhizedek bangin a tawntungin siampi na hi hi,” a ci hi
Nangma taklamah Topa hong om a, ama heh ni-in kumpite a zogawp ding hi
Kumpipa in minamte lakah thu khen ding a, tua munte si luanghawm tawh a dimsak ding hi. Amah in a zai mahmah leitungah ukpite a susia ding hi
Amah in lampi gei-a om luitui dawn ding a, amah a tha hatin a gualzopa hi ding hi.
